Hoho... As expected, a woman must stand in the kitchen... Thanks to Elly, this house

\SE[5]What's this... You're being cold, Elly... You can call me Papa like you do on the

\.Hm?\COM[exc]\SE[4]

\SE[default]...Hoho, what is it, \n[1]? I see, I had borrowed Elly for tonight. You came looking

N-no, that's not it! I was just looking for my sister because I was worried about
her...! Me being hungry is a separate issue...!

\SE[1]Now, now, I understand. You must be starving after working since morning. How about
it, why not join us and eat Elly's cooking?

\SE[7]You stay quiet...! \.\SE[default]Come on, isn't that fine? Once in a while, let's enjoy a

BGM音量を50までフェードアウト
Village Chief, it's been a while!

\SE[2]Oh, \n[1]! You've returned! It has been a long time...! It's been quite a while since
you and Mana left the village that day...!
Yes...! Thank you for allowing us to set out on our journey back then!

The Village Chief picked us up after we lost our parents long ago and raised us
properly until now. He's like a foster parent to us siblings and Mana. If it weren't
for him, we probably wouldn't be alive like this now.

...Even though we've always been in your care, in the end, we left the village
without being able to give anything back... I thought at least this time I could
bring back some earnings from our adventure, but...

For Mana's treatment and living expenses, I left all my savings behind. It was money
the two of us had saved up to give to the village, but... It's an expense that's
absolutely necessary for Mana right now......

\SE[default]Hoho... Don't worry about it. You two are like family to me. I'm plenty happy just
seeing your healthy face.

I'm glad I came back after so long...! I've always felt guilty about not being able
to repay the village... But the Village Chief is still the same kind old man as
always...!
\SE[6]...By the way, what about Mana? Don't tell me you came back alone...?

I explained that Mana had ended up needing treatment... At first, the Village Chief
seemed surprised too, but after hearing the whole story, he nodded as if he
understood.

I see, Mana's magic... That's terrible...! That girl's magic has been a great help to
the village since long ago... If she can't use it anymore, it's a serious matter. She
must rest.
\SE[default]...So, \n[1]. Will you be staying in this village for a while...?
Yes, since there's nothing for me to do in the Royal City either......

\SE[1]Oh, that's good! As it happens, we're short on hands in this village right now and in
a bind!

\SE[6]Actually, right now... they're building the lord's mansion near this village. I don't
know the reason, but for some reason the decision was made suddenly. I don't know
what business a noble has in such a rural place...

Moreover, they took several villagers with them for that mansion's construction. The
few young people in this village... Your friend Dario was taken too.
Dario too... I see, so that's why there was no one at his house.

\SE[2]And so, with hands disappearing from this village, several problems have arisen. So
\n[1], if you have time, could you go around the village and help everyone?
Understood! If there's anything I can do to help everyone in the village...!
Alright! I'll go around the village and help with everyone's work!
BGM音量を90までフェードイン
As for places in this village that seem to need help right now...

\SE[3]Hmm, nothing in particular, it seems. In that case, you should go keep Elly
company... You'd better make up with that girl soon.

The farm at Dario's house has been left to ruin. Could you do something about it in
place of the owner there?
// 進行度1昼のみ、エリィイベ開始

\SE[3]Hmm? What is it, \n[1]? Are you perhaps free right now? If so, there's something I'd
like to ask of you...

\SE[2]I see, that's a great help. Then come with me. I need the strength of a young man
like you...
--------このイベントで起こる処理

When I told the Village Chief the work was complete, he was very pleased! I feel like
I've repaid a bit of my debt to him...! Alright, I'll keep working hard to be useful
to everyone!
対象数値パラメータ = countHero
テンプレテキスト代入
対象文字パラメータ = bust

\SE[5]Oh, that's a shame... Please help me out again when you have time. If you have even a
little pity for this old man...
As for places in this village that seem to need help right now...

The innkeeper couple were grumbling about getting busy from this time onward... If
you have some free time, why not go help them out as a part-timer?

Come to think of it... I hear a strange brat has been appearing in the village
lately. Could you check if there really is such a fellow?
As for places in this village that seem to need help right now...

Around this time, the tool shop owner should be returning from the construction site
at the lord's mansion. That fellow has seemed busy lately, so lend him a hand.

That's right, while you were away, an open-air bath was built at the bathhouse. If
you haven't tried it yet, you should go.

Come to think of it, those fools who are always making a racket at the tavern said
they wanted to drink with you. If you have time, go keep them company.

\SE[3]Oh, \n[1], what is it? You want to work to pay Dario back...? Hoho... It seems you've
been tricked by that fellow again.

\SE[2]If that's the case, how about you clean my house? It's a big house, but I don't use
many rooms. Just the first floor will be enough.

\SE[default]Well then, I'll leave it to you. It's been a while since you cleaned my house. It
brings back memories...

You cleaned while chatting with the village chief. If anything, talking became the
main focus... Well, the chief seemed happy, so it's fine...
Thank you, \n[1]. It was fun talking so much.
\SE[2]Oh, you've come again, \n[1]. Well then, I'll ask you to do some cleaning.

Is that so! Well then, first sit down here... I just acquired some sweets I think
you'd like...

I cleaned while chatting with the village chief... or rather, I mostly just listened
to the chief talk. Well, he seemed happy, so I guess this is fine...?
Thank you, \n[1]. It was fun talking so much.
\SE[5]...Hmm, what should I do... Oh, \n[1]? Perfect timing, I wanted to ask you something...

\SE[2]It's nothing, it doesn't have any deep meaning... How long do you plan to stay in
this village? We can't just leave Mana alone forever.

\SE[8]...You found something you want to do in the village, so you don't plan to return for
a while...? What is this thing you want to do? ......You don't want to tell me? Hmph,
how cold...

\SE[2]It can't be helped... I suppose I have to do it while I'm still healthy... Hoho,
don't worry about this old man's talk.

\SE[2]So, \n[1], how is Elly doing? She seems to be enjoying herself with everyone, doesn't
she? A woman's happiness, you know, that's what it's all about.

Being desired by many men, with the children she bears cared for by the entire
village... Don't you think this environment is the ideal for a female? In fact, that
girl must be very pleased right now, don't you think?

\SE[2]If you truly believe that girl desires liberation from this village, I won't stop you
from working on our behalf...

\SE[default]However, it will end in futility. Elly will almost certainly refuse to leave... That
girl's trauma is not so easily healed.

\SE[2]\n[1]...! You really worked hard for us...! Day after day, working like a horse,
earning all this money for us...!

\SE[1]Oh...with this much money, I could splurge for days at the royal city's brothels...!
Hoho...I'm looking forward to it!
U-um, Village Chief... As promised, you'll lift the magic you cast on Elly, right...?

\SE[default]...Hmm? We're not mages, you know. There's no way we could do something like that.
Don't you know that, even as an adventurer?

\SE[2]Well then, I think I'll set off for the royal city or somewhere. I might as well go
see Mana while I'm at it! Now that she can't use magic, maybe even I have a chance♡
........ Ah, ahh........ What in the world did I do all this for........
